extraction.one_line_summary: FRAILE Omar won from early breakaway, attacking 1.5km from summit to drop STUYVEN and hold off late-charging ALAPHILIPPE by 6 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Alaphilippe attacked for KOM points with 600m to summit but left chase too late, losing 6 seconds despite closing 12-second gap.
GC trio Thomas-Froome-Dumoulin collaborated through finish to limit Roglic's time gain to 7 seconds despite his solo effort.
Dan Martin's puncture at 5km remaining cost him 1:43 and one GC position, showing vulnerability of isolated riders late-stage.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: misjudged timing of KOM attack from 600m out, visibly doubting himself mid-chase according to commentators
rider_signals.STUYVEN Jasper: positive: recovered from being caught to finish third after regrouping on descent, showing resilience
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacked solo from GC group to gain 7 seconds on top three, only rider willing to test them
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: described as 'not having a good race at all' after conceding time to GC trio
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: late puncture at 5km exposed lack of team support, losing 1:43 and dropping from potential top-5
